title: Mixed with Multiword Prepositions
description: Practice one preposition from Sets 1–5 together with one multiword preposition from Set 6.

questions.sentence: We waited ___ noon ___ the station.
questions.completedSentence: We waited until noon in front of the station.
questions.japanese: 駅の前で正午まで待った。

questions.sentence: ___ the schedule, the meeting starts ___ 2:00.
questions.completedSentence: according to the schedule, the meeting starts at 2:00.
questions.japanese: 予定表によると、会議は2時に始まる。

questions.sentence: The café is ___ the bank ___ the station.
questions.completedSentence: The café is next to the bank near the station.
questions.japanese: そのカフェは駅の近くで銀行の隣にある。

questions.sentence: She worked ___ the afternoon ___ the rain.
questions.completedSentence: She worked during the afternoon in spite of the rain.
questions.japanese: 雨にもかかわらず、彼女は午後に働いた。

questions.sentence: We walked ___ the station ___ the park.
questions.completedSentence: We walked toward the station instead of the park.
questions.japanese: 公園ではなく駅の方へ歩いた。

questions.sentence: We arrived ___ noon ___ the express train.
questions.completedSentence: We arrived at noon thanks to the express train.
questions.japanese: 急行列車のおかげで正午に到着した。

questions.sentence: The hotel lies ___ the river ___ the airport.
questions.completedSentence: The hotel lies beyond the river far from the airport.
questions.japanese: そのホテルは空港から遠く、川の向こうにある。

questions.sentence: He spoke ___ confidence ___ the criticism.
questions.completedSentence: He spoke with confidence regardless of the criticism.
questions.japanese: 批判に関係なく、彼は自信を持って話した。

questions.sentence: The puppy ran ___ the kitchen ___ the yard.
questions.completedSentence: The puppy ran out of the kitchen into the yard.
questions.japanese: 子犬は台所から出て庭へ走り込んだ。

questions.sentence: The library is ___ campus ___ the cafeteria.
questions.completedSentence: The library is close to campus near the cafeteria.
questions.japanese: 図書館は大学の近くで学生食堂のそばにある。

questions.sentence: We stayed ___ ___ the storm.
questions.completedSentence: We stayed inside in spite of the storm.
questions.japanese: 嵐にもかかわらず、私たちは屋内にいた。

questions.sentence: ___ the map, the village is ___ the hills.
questions.completedSentence: according to the map, the village is beyond the hills.
questions.japanese: 地図によると、その村は丘の向こうにある。

questions.sentence: She chose tea ___ coffee ___ lunch.
questions.completedSentence: She chose tea instead of coffee after lunch.
questions.japanese: 昼食後、コーヒーではなく紅茶を選んだ。

questions.sentence: The event succeeded ___ the volunteers ___ the evening.
questions.completedSentence: The event succeeded thanks to the volunteers during the evening.
questions.japanese: ボランティアのおかげで、行事は夕方に成功した。

questions.sentence: We took seats ___ the window ___ the door.
questions.completedSentence: We took seats next to the window near the door.
questions.japanese: ドアの近くで窓の隣の席に座った。

questions.sentence: The train stopped ___ the station ___ a signal problem.
questions.completedSentence: The train stopped in front of the station during a signal problem.
questions.japanese: 列車は信号の問題が起きている間、駅の前で止まった。

questions.sentence: ___ the weather report, the game begins ___ noon.
questions.completedSentence: according to the weather report, the game begins at noon.
questions.japanese: 天気予報によると、試合は正午に始まる。

questions.sentence: Our hotel is ___ the beach ___ the city.
questions.completedSentence: Our hotel is close to the beach outside the city.
questions.japanese: 私たちのホテルは町の外で海岸の近くにある。

questions.sentence: The cabin is ___ the village ___ the river.
questions.completedSentence: The cabin is far from the village beyond the river.
questions.japanese: その小屋は村から遠く、川の向こうにある。

questions.sentence: We used paper cups ___ glasses ___ the picnic.
questions.completedSentence: We used paper cups instead of glasses during the picnic.
questions.japanese: ピクニック中、グラスの代わりに紙コップを使った。

questions.sentence: The kitten jumped ___ its basket ___ the low table.
questions.completedSentence: The kitten jumped out of its basket onto the low table.
questions.japanese: 子猫はかごから飛び出して低いテーブルの上へ飛び乗った。

questions.sentence: The pharmacy is ___ the hospital ___ the bus stop.
questions.completedSentence: The pharmacy is next to the hospital near the bus stop.
questions.japanese: 薬局はバス停の近くで病院の隣にある。

questions.sentence: We finished ___ an hour ___ your help.
questions.completedSentence: We finished within an hour thanks to your help.
questions.japanese: あなたの助けのおかげで1時間以内に終えた。

questions.sentence: He kept running ___ the pain ___ the race.
questions.completedSentence: He kept running regardless of the pain during the race.
questions.japanese: 痛みに関係なく、彼はレース中も走り続けた。

questions.sentence: ___ the heavy rain, we walked ___ the bridge.
questions.completedSentence: in spite of the heavy rain, we walked across the bridge.
questions.japanese: 激しい雨にもかかわらず、橋を歩いて渡った。

questions.sentence: The taxi waited ___ the hotel ___ midnight.
questions.completedSentence: The taxi waited in front of the hotel until midnight.
questions.japanese: タクシーはホテルの前で深夜まで待っていた。

questions.sentence: ___ Ken, the test begins ___ noon.
questions.completedSentence: according to Ken, the test begins at noon.
questions.japanese: ケンによると、試験は正午に始まる。

questions.sentence: A small café is ___ the station ___ the road.
questions.completedSentence: A small café is close to the station across the road.
questions.japanese: 小さなカフェが駅の近くで道路の向こう側にある。

questions.sentence: She studied ___ going out ___ the evening.
questions.completedSentence: She studied instead of going out during the evening.
questions.japanese: 外出せず、彼女は夕方に勉強した。

questions.sentence: The dog ran ___ the house ___ the street.
questions.completedSentence: The dog ran out of the house across the street.
questions.japanese: 犬は家から出て通りを横切った。

questions.sentence: We met ___ the library ___ class.
questions.completedSentence: We met in front of the library after class.
questions.japanese: 授業後、図書館の前で会った。

questions.sentence: ___ the notice, the office closes ___ 5:00.
questions.completedSentence: according to the notice, the office closes at 5:00.
questions.japanese: 掲示によると、事務室は5時に閉まる。

questions.sentence: The station is ___ the hotel ___ the river.
questions.completedSentence: The station is close to the hotel near the river.
questions.japanese: 駅は川の近くでホテルにも近い。

questions.sentence: The school is ___ my house ___ the city center.
questions.completedSentence: The school is far from my house outside the city center.
questions.japanese: その学校は町の中心部の外にあり、私の家から遠い。

questions.sentence: She walked ___ taking the bus ___ the rain.
questions.completedSentence: She walked instead of taking the bus despite the rain.
questions.japanese: 雨にもかかわらず、彼女はバスに乗らず歩いた。

questions.sentence: The bird flew ___ the cage ___ the roof.
questions.completedSentence: The bird flew out of the cage onto the roof.
questions.japanese: 鳥はかごから飛び出して屋根の上へ止まった。

questions.sentence: The café is ___ the bank ___ the road.
questions.completedSentence: The café is next to the bank across the road.
questions.japanese: そのカフェは道路の向こう側で銀行の隣にある。

questions.sentence: We finished ___ the deadline ___ the new system.
questions.completedSentence: We finished before the deadline thanks to the new system.
questions.japanese: 新しい制度のおかげで締め切り前に終えた。

questions.sentence: Everyone may join ___ age ___ the festival.
questions.completedSentence: Everyone may join regardless of age at the festival.
questions.japanese: 年齢に関係なく、その祭りには誰でも参加できる。

questions.sentence: ___ the cold, he waited ___ the gate.
questions.completedSentence: in spite of the cold, he waited outside the gate.
questions.japanese: 寒さにもかかわらず、彼は門の外で待った。

questions.sentence: A crowd gathered ___ the stage ___ noon.
questions.completedSentence: A crowd gathered in front of the stage at noon.
questions.japanese: 正午に舞台の前へ人が集まった。

questions.sentence: ___ the guidebook, the temple lies ___ the bridge.
questions.completedSentence: according to the guidebook, the temple lies beyond the bridge.
questions.japanese: ガイドブックによると、その寺は橋の向こうにある。

questions.sentence: Our classroom is ___ the library ___ the stairs.
questions.completedSentence: Our classroom is close to the library near the stairs.
questions.japanese: 私たちの教室は階段の近くで図書館にも近い。

questions.sentence: He chose the train ___ the bus ___ class.
questions.completedSentence: He chose the train instead of the bus after class.
questions.japanese: 彼は授業後、バスではなく電車を選んだ。

questions.sentence: The children ran ___ the classroom ___ the playground.
questions.completedSentence: The children ran out of the classroom into the playground.
questions.japanese: 子どもたちは教室から出て運動場へ走り込んだ。

questions.sentence: We waited ___ the museum ___ the rain.
questions.completedSentence: We waited in front of the museum despite the rain.
questions.japanese: 雨にもかかわらず、博物館の前で待った。

questions.sentence: ___ the timetable, the bus leaves ___ 8:30.
questions.completedSentence: according to the timetable, the bus leaves at 8:30.
questions.japanese: 時刻表によると、バスは8時30分に出発する。

questions.sentence: The restaurant is ___ the station ___ the hotel.
questions.completedSentence: The restaurant is close to the station near the hotel.
questions.japanese: そのレストランは駅の近くでホテルのそばにある。

questions.sentence: The farm lies ___ the town ___ the hills.
questions.completedSentence: The farm lies far from the town beyond the hills.
questions.japanese: その農場は町から遠く、丘の向こうにある。

questions.sentence: She used a tablet ___ a laptop ___ class.
questions.completedSentence: She used a tablet instead of a laptop during class.
questions.japanese: 彼女は授業中、ノートパソコンの代わりにタブレットを使った。

questions.sentence: The ball rolled ___ the room ___ the stairs.
questions.completedSentence: The ball rolled out of the room down the stairs.
questions.japanese: ボールは部屋から出て階段を転がり落ちた。

questions.sentence: The bookstore is ___ the café ___ the library.
questions.completedSentence: The bookstore is next to the café near the library.
questions.japanese: その本屋は図書館の近くでカフェの隣にある。

questions.sentence: We finished ___ noon ___ your advice.
questions.completedSentence: We finished by noon thanks to your advice.
questions.japanese: あなたの助言のおかげで正午までに終えた。

questions.sentence: He kept working ___ the noise ___ the night.
questions.completedSentence: He kept working regardless of the noise during the night.
questions.japanese: 騒音に関係なく、彼は夜の間も働き続けた。

questions.sentence: ___ the fog, the plane flew ___ the city.
questions.completedSentence: in spite of the fog, the plane flew over the city.
questions.japanese: 霧にもかかわらず、飛行機は町の上空を飛んだ。

questions.sentence: A taxi stopped ___ the station ___ noon.
questions.completedSentence: A taxi stopped in front of the station at noon.
questions.japanese: タクシーは正午に駅の前で止まった。

questions.sentence: ___ the teacher, the quiz must be completed ___ ten minutes.
questions.completedSentence: according to the teacher, the quiz must be completed within ten minutes.
questions.japanese: 先生によると、小テストは10分以内に終えなければならない。

questions.sentence: The gym is ___ campus ___ the river.
questions.completedSentence: The gym is close to campus near the river.
questions.japanese: 体育館は大学の近くで川のそばにある。

questions.sentence: We walked ___ driving ___ the afternoon.
questions.completedSentence: We walked instead of driving during the afternoon.
questions.japanese: 午後、車を運転せずに歩いた。

questions.sentence: The dog jumped ___ the car ___ the road.
questions.completedSentence: The dog jumped out of the car onto the road.
questions.japanese: 犬は車から飛び出して道路の上へ降りた。
